channel.title: How to get custom data-id of a element value in action?
channel.description: I have a anchor tag and onClick. I want to get data-id along with state in actions.

item.title: How to get custom data-id of a element value in action?
item.dc:creator: sanjeevsetu
item.description:
Thanks for reply. It is solved now.

Read full topic
item.source: How to get custom data-id of a element value in action?

item.title: How to get custom data-id of a element value in action?
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @sanjeevsetu

Could you provide more detail about what you’re trying to do please. Is the data you’re trying to access already in the state? Can you provide a link to a repo so that community members can see your code and clone your project in order to try to help you.

See here for the kind of info that it’s useful to provide.

Read full topic
item.source: How to get custom data-id of a element value in action?

item.description:
